title: Оptimized Pack
body:
![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d0baa0c21ecc7bfb9f42dab8f9ac871c2298fe1b.png)

Have you been looking for a modpack with optimized mods for your build or just to play? Optimized Pack is the best choice for you! This pack contains all the mods for optimization and enjoyable play with complex mods or for playing on weak PCs.
Forget about lags and low FPS, this pack will work on all pc, even weak ones.
If you have more questions, you can ask it in our [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/CZ6Mb4hn)

⚠️𝗪𝗔𝗥𝗡𝗜𝗡𝗚!!⚠️ If you will add these mods, 𝗕𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗥𝗘𝗙𝗨𝗟 these mods can have bugs/not compatible with others mods, so do at your own 𝗥𝗜𝗦𝗞!!!
